zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas de Morham於大約1255年出生在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾莫哈姆時，他的父親Adam de Morham36歲，母親Mariota33歲。他和Ele St Martin至少有1個女兒。他去世於1297年在英國蘇格蘭易亞斯特 洛迪安加瓦爾德 安德 巴拉莫哈姆享年43歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Morham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Scottish: locative name from Morham (E Lothian).

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas de Morham was born about 1255, in Morham, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, his father, Adam de Morham, was 36 and his mother, Mariota, was 33. He had at least 1 daughter with Ele St Martin. He died in 1297, in Morham, Garvald and Bara, East Lothian, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 43.

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas de Morham(이)가 대략 1255년 스컷랜드 하딩토실르 모르함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Adam de Morham(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Mariota(은)는 33세였다. 그는 Ele St Martin(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1297년 영국 스코틀랜드 이스트 로스이언 가발드 앤드 버라 모르함에서 43세의 나이로 사망했다.
